Video.summary: Carl Reiner and Melba Moore guest star on this episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carl Reiner, Melba Moore

Video.summary: The hilarious spoof "Went With The Wind!" is presented for your entertainment. Dinah Shore guest stars.
Video.title: Dinah Shore

Video.summary: Tonight's guests: Maggie Smith and Tim Conway!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Maggie Smith, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Steve Martin and Betty White catch a wave in the movie spoof "Beach Blanket Boo-Boo!".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Martin, Betty White

Video.summary: Guest Neil Sedaka joins the gang for a set of commercial parodies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Neil Sedaka

Video.summary: Lucy and Carol play rival Rent-A-Car agents vying for Tim's business.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring

Image.alt: Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring

Video.summary: Vincent Price and Eydie Gorme star. Features an encounter on an elevator & the movie spoof "House Of Terror."
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Guest star Soupy Sales plays a hospital patient, and joins Carol for the movie spoof "Mildred Fierce."
Video.title: Soupy Sales, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Broadway legend Gwen Verdon and Pat Boone join for an installment of "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Gwen Verdon, Pat Boone

Video.summary: Carol plays a housewife obsessed with celebrity gossip. Then, a take-off on a classic with "Rebecky."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: The cast of "The Carol Burnett Show" revisits some of their favorite moments from the show.
Video.title: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Image.alt: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers
The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Video.summary: The Pointer Sisters are tonight's musical guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: The season finale features Carol putting the cast on the spot for Q&A, as well as beloved recurring sketches.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: John Byner & Helen Reddy join Carol in a sketch about swingers. Also, The Family plays a game of "Sorry!"
Video.title: John Byner, Helen Reddy

Video.summary: Highlights Dick Van Dyke as a TV announcer who fills in when technical difficulties scuttle the movie.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Sammy Davis Jr. stars, appearing as a star who returns to his hometown. Also: a look at a No-Frills Airline.
Video.title: Sammy Davis Jr.

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell and The Jackson 5 guest star!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Roddy McDowall, Jackson Five

Video.summary: Tim Conway steals Carol's heart in a sketch about two shoppers browsing waterbeds.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Diahann Carroll

Video.summary: Anthony Newley & Bernadette Peters guest. Featuring The Invisible Man's mother and a man who can get anything.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Anthony Newley

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters & Donald O'Connor star. Includes Carol & Peters' duet. Also "Carol & Sis" & "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Donald O'Connor

Video.summary: Guests Art Carney and Nanette Fabray appear in "Guess What's Coming To Dinner?" and "Passion On 10th Avenue."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Art Carney

Video.summary: Ray Charles is a highlight of this episode, featuring Tim Conway in a sketch where they are billboard hangers.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Ray Charles

Video.summary: Alan King & Lena Zavaroni join Carol for sketches set on Hollywood Boulevard, a baseball game, and a bus stop.
Video.title: Alan King, Lena Zavaroni

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway is featured in two sketches, pairing him with Harvey and Carol, respectively.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Michele Lee and Flip Wilson dazzle with song and stand-up comedy, and Carol vamps in "V.I.P." as Mae East.
Video.title: Michele Lee, Flip Wilson

Video.summary: Kitchen commercials highlight this episode, and Tim returns as the steelworker looking to do away with Carol.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Comedian Alan King guest stars as Carol's distracted psychiatrist.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Alan King

Video.summary: Tim Conway guests for a sketch where a betrothed couple elect to paint their future home-with messy results.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays a 35 year old orphan looking to be adopted.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Jack Cassidy

Video.summary: Features commercial spoofs, Harvey trying to give a speech, and Carol demonstrating how nobody notices her.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim and Carol spar over a call, Tim tries to sell Vicki a vacuum, and the gang performs a musical recital.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim Conway & Steve Lawrence guest! A chimp bites Tim in one sketch, while another looks at relationships.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Paul Sand & Eydie Gorme guest. Includes salute to series like "Dr. Kildaire", and Paul & Eydie join a sketch.
Video.title: Paul Sand, Eydie Gorrme

Video.summary: Mr. Tudball tries to implement a fire safety program. Also: an oasis might be salvation for Harvey & Tim.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Joel Grey & Vincent Price guest. They play guests at a hotel where Carol is the operator. Also "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Joel Grey, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Nancy Wilson and Nanette Fabray star in "As The Stomach Turns." On "Carol & Sis", siblings practice First Aid.
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Nanette Fabray
